claims.text: The reviewed January-February 2026 slice contains five disclosed DVAG donations totalling EUR 340,000 to four political parties.

evidence.summary: The official page records four donations on 27 January 2026 and one on 2 February 2026 from DVAG, totalling EUR 340,000.

decision.rationale: The amount, dates, recipients and donor name are directly supported by the official Bundestag disclosure. The public wording is limited to the reviewed slice.

claims.text: DVAG has the official Lobby Register entry R005553 and declares interests including public finance, pensions, banking, consumer protection and insurance.

evidence.summary: The official entry identifies DVAG under register number R005553 and lists the selected policy-interest areas.

decision.rationale: The register number, organisation and selected interests are directly visible in the official Lobby Register entry.

claims.text: DVAG's donations caused or purchased a favourable political decision on pensions or financial regulation.

evidence.summary: The graph documents donations and declared lobbying interests but contains no evidence that a payment caused a decision.
The available official records describe registration and declared interests; they do not establish a quid pro quo or causal purchase of a policy result.

decision.rationale: Temporal proximity and overlapping subject matter do not prove bribery, unlawful influence or causation. No supporting evidence establishes the proposed claim.
